title: urena lobata var. henryi
intro: Urena lobata var. henryi, also known as the prickly nut senna or prickly burr senna, is a variety of the Urena lobata plant, a type of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. Traditionally used in folk medicine, Urena lobata var. henryi has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant's health benefits include its ability to treat various ailments such as digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural laxative. Urena lobata var. henryi is often prepared as an herbal tea or infused in oil to extract its medicinal compounds, and can also be used as a topical application for skin issues.
